name: Cal.diy
description: Cal.diy is the open source community edition of Cal.com, a scheduling and booking platform. It lets you self-host event types, availability schedules and calendar integrations. It is community maintained and intended for personal, non-production use only.

notes.text: The build is a heavy Turborepo monorepo build and needs at least 8GB RAM and ~20GB disk; reduce only after a successful first build. Generated DB and secret values are saved to /root/caldiy.creds.
First boot runs Prisma migrations, so the web UI may be unavailable for a minute or two. Create the first user at http://IP:3000/auth/setup. Configuration file: /opt/caldiy/.env
Cal.diy is community maintained and strictly recommended for personal, non-production use. For commercial use see Cal.com.
